response:
**Answer:**  
The film that featured the song "No Matter What" on the US edition of its soundtrack was **Notting Hill**. The song was produced by **Andrew Lloyd Webber, Jim Steinman, Nigel Wright** with additional production by **Franglen & Lupino**. 

**Shared Profession:**  
The film **Notting Hill** was produced by **Duncan Kenworthy** and directed by **Roger Michell**. However, the question specifically asks who produced the song "No Matter What" on the US edition of the soundtrack, which was **produced by Andrew Lloyd Webber, Jim Steinman, Nigel Wright**, and **Franglen & Lupino**. 

**Final Answer:**  
The song "No Matter What" was produced by **Andrew Lloyd Webber, Jim Steinman, Nigel Wright**, and **Franglen & Lupino**.
